title: Why Your Intercom AI Gives Every Customer the Same Answer
metaTitle: Forage + Claude + Intercom: AI Support With Real Customer Intelligence
metaDescription: Intercom Fin answers tickets. It does not know who the customer is. Here is how to wire Forage into your Claude support agent so every reply is informed by real company context.

faqSchema.question: How do I add company intelligence to Intercom Fin?
faqSchema.answer: Connect Forage to your Intercom workflow via n8n or a custom webhook handler. When a new conversation opens, query Forage for the customer's company profile and inject that context into Claude's system prompt before generating the first response. The full setup takes under an hour.

faqSchema.question: Does Forage work with Claude for customer support?
faqSchema.answer: Yes. Forage is an MCP server and Claude connects to MCP servers natively via claude_desktop_config.json or any MCP-compatible orchestration layer. Claude can call Forage tools to retrieve company context, enrich customer records, and write new signals back to the knowledge graph after each conversation.

faqSchema.question: What company data does Forage return for customer enrichment?
faqSchema.answer: Forage returns company size, funding stage, technology stack, key decision-makers, recent hiring or funding signals, and any entities already in the knowledge graph from previous sessions. It also returns relationship context if the company has been researched or interacted with before.

faqSchema.question: Can Forage help with Intercom conversation routing?
faqSchema.answer: Yes. With company context available at the start of each conversation, your routing logic can consider account value, funding stage, health score, and recent signals rather than just ticket category. High-value accounts or distressed accounts can be flagged for immediate human handoff.
